home.title: Justivia
home.tagline: Your legal intelligence specialized in Algerian Administrative Law

laws.simulationDesc: Simulation of an Algerian law database specialized in administrative matters.

about.title: About & Acknowledgments
about.subtitle: Justivia Graduation Project - Algerian Administrative Legal Intelligence
about.description: This platform was developed as an advanced legal artificial intelligence tool, specialized in analyzing and interpreting Algerian administrative laws and regulations to facilitate access to legal information for researchers and legal practitioners.
about.acknowledgmentText: With feelings of gratitude and appreciation, we extend our sincere thanks and praise to Dr. Misbahia Nadia for her tireless supervision and wise guidance, which served as a beacon throughout our research journey. We also thank our honorable families and everyone who supported and encouraged us to complete this humble work in the best possible way.

terms.title: Terms of Service & Services
terms.subtitle: Rules governing the use of the Justivia Legal Intelligence platform
terms.intro: Your use of the Justivia platform is subject to these terms and conditions. By browsing the platform or using the AI Legal Consultant, you agree to comply fully with these terms.
terms.section1Text: Justivia is an interactive AI platform aimed at simulating and interpreting Algerian legal texts. The answers provided by the virtual consultant are for guidance and educational purposes only and do not constitute official legal advice that replaces a lawyer or a judge.
terms.section2Text: We make every effort to ensure the accuracy and updating of legal texts and answers generated by the system. However, the platform and its developers assume no responsibility for any decisions made based on AI outputs without reviewing the Official Gazette.
terms.section3Text: It is forbidden to use the platform to generate offensive content, launch cyber attacks, or extract data excessively in a way that harms the infrastructure. The platform reserves the right to suspend any account violating these terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we protect your personal data and interactions with the platform
privacy.intro: At Justivia, we commit to the highest levels of confidentiality and privacy for our users' data in accordance with applicable rules.
privacy.section1Text: We collect basic registration data (name and email) to improve your experience, provide the feature of saving favorite laws, and store legal chat history.
privacy.section2Text: All conversations and consultations you pose to the AI consultant are fully encrypted and strictly confidential. The content of your inquiries is not shared with any third parties and is used only to improve model accuracy locally.
privacy.section3Text: You have the full right to edit your personal data, or permanently delete your account, which will result in the immediate deletion of all search history and conversations associated with you from our servers.
